summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WYSIWYG editor implementation for AZ Riscossione service pages. All major features working correctly including TipTap-based rich text editor, ServicesEditor with 3 tabs, formatting toolbar, SEO functionality, and service page rendering.
passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with hero section and services
Admin login works with credentials admin@azriscossione.it / AzAdmin2024!
Admin Servizi tab shows ServicesEditor component
ServicesEditor has sidebar with 10 services (ICI/IMU, TARSU/TARES/TARI, TOSAP, etc.)
ServicesEditor has 3 tabs: Contenuto, Impostazioni, SEO
Clicking 'Modifica' shows WYSIWYG editor with TipTap
WYSIWYG toolbar has H1-H4 buttons working
WYSIWYG toolbar has bold, italic, underline, strikethrough buttons
WYSIWYG toolbar has alignment buttons (left, center, right, justify)
WYSIWYG toolbar has list buttons (bullet, numbered)
WYSIWYG toolbar has image insert button
WYSIWYG toolbar has link, undo, redo, spacing buttons
Rich text editor accepts content input and formatting
SEO tab has Meta Title and Meta Description fields
SEO tab shows Google preview section
Service page /servizi/ici-imu renders correctly
Service page shows description in blue box
Service page has sidebar with all 10 services
Service page has contact card with phone and email
Service page has proper navigation and breadcrumbs
All 23 backend API endpoints working (from previous test)
Services content can be edited and saved through WYSIWYG interface
